title: leucas moluccoides
intro: Leucas moluccoides, also known as the Molucca buttonbush, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Leucas moluccoides has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and fighting infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
